hero.headlinePrefix: A calmer wholesale workflow, built to
hero.subheadline: Quotes, pricing, orders, and BG-compliant proformas — all in one place.

trusted.subheadline: Powering wholesale operations for companies across Europe

features.title: Built for wholesalers, not retail stores
features.subtitle: Replace spreadsheets and retail plugins with a single wholesale-native workspace.

catalogPricing.title: Catalog & client pricing
catalogPricing.description: Merge supplier feeds into one clean listing. Set negotiated tiers, volume discounts, and validity windows per buyer — all visible to your team.

quoteToOrder.title: Quote to order & proformas
quoteToOrder.description: Collect requests, route approvals, and move to order in minutes. Generate BG-compliant PDFs with EIK, VAT ID, IBAN, and MOL fields ready for audits.

csv.title: CSV import & automation
csv.description: Normalize supplier files and refresh your catalog with clean mappings. Ingest multiple supplier files without manual cleanup.

complaints.title: Complaints & reporting
complaints.description: Log issues with suppliers or buyers and keep a clear resolution timeline. Track margin, repeat orders, and pipeline without spreadsheets.

buyers.title: For buyers
buyers.subtitle: Faster approvals, fewer surprises
bullets: Browse accurate availability and lead times

workflow.title: A predictable wholesale flow
workflow.subtitle: Every step from import to proforma is tracked and visible.

steps.title: Import catalog
steps.detail: Upload supplier files once and keep listings up to date.

steps.title: Buyer requests quote
steps.detail: Clients pick items, quantities, and delivery terms.

steps.title: Approve
steps.detail: Sales locks pricing and confirms lead times.

steps.title: Proforma
steps.detail: Send compliant PDFs and confirm the order.

stats.title: Operational results you can measure
stats.subtitle: Move faster with clearer data and fewer manual handoffs.

items.label: faster quote turnaround
items.detail: Average time from request to approved proforma.

items.label: catalog refresh
items.detail: From supplier file to buyer-ready listings.

items.quote: We replaced spreadsheets, plugins, and email threads with a single workflow. Quotes now close the same day.
items.name: Mila Georgieva

items.quote: Client pricing finally lives in one place. Our buyers get the right terms without back-and-forth.
items.name: Atanas Iliev

items.quote: Proforma documents are compliant by default, so accounting is no longer a bottleneck.
items.name: Hristo Petrov

faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before modernizing your wholesale workflow.
faq.cardBody: Book a 20-minute demo with a product specialist.

items.question: Is this built for wholesalers or retail stores?
items.answer: This platform is purpose-built for wholesalers. It replaces the retail-store-plus-plugins model with dedicated wholesale workflows.

items.question: How do buyers access pricing?
items.answer: Buyers can use a branded portal or be invited into private accounts with negotiated price tiers.

items.question: What BG compliance fields are included?
items.answer: Proforma PDFs include EIK, VAT ID, IBAN, and MOL fields aligned with Bulgarian and EU trade standards.

items.question: Can we manage multiple supplier catalogs?
items.answer: Yes. Supplier files are normalized into a single catalog with shared reporting.

items.question: How fast can we launch?
items.answer: Most teams go live within days after import and portal branding.

items.question: Do you help with onboarding?
items.answer: We provide assisted import, data mapping, and training for your sales team.

cta.title: Replace manual workflows with a single wholesale platform.
cta.subtitle: Start your free trial, import your catalog, and invite buyers to a branded portal today.

footer.tagline: The B2B platform built for distributors, importers, and wholesale buyers.

columnMapping.mustBeMapped: The following required fields must be mapped to continue:

columnMapping.tip: 💡 Tip: Only one column should be mapped to this field. The system will automatically unmap previous columns when you select a new one.
columnMapping.categorySubcategoryInfo: Category and Sub-Category can only be assigned to one column each. These fields are protected to ensure proper category mapping in the next step.
columnMapping.smartMatchingDescription: Columns are auto-mapped using pattern matching across multiple languages (German, Greek, Bulgarian, Dutch). Adjust any mapping by selecting a different field from the dropdown.

proformaInvoice.title: Proforma Invoice
proformaInvoice.legalNote: According to Art.6, Para.1, Item 3 of the Accounting Act, the names and signatures of the preparer and receiver are not mandatory invoice requisites.
proformaInvoice.proformaDisclaimer: PROFORMA INVOICE – This document is a proforma invoice and does not constitute a tax document. Prices and availability are indicative and may change. Valid for 30 days from the date of issue.

distributors.title: Manage Clients
distributors.subtitle: View and manage your B2B clients
distributors.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, company, or email...
distributors.commissionRateTooltip: This applies as a discount to prices in their catalog views. e.g., 15% means products show 15% off for this client.
distributors.commissionRateHelp: Enter a value between 0 and 50. This discount will be applied to all catalog prices for this client.
distributors.commissionRateError: Commission rate must be between 0% and 50%
distributors.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
distributors.noDistributorsDesc: When B2B clients sign up with a company role, they will appear here for you to manage.
distributors.errorLoadingDesc: There was an error loading the clients list. Please try again.
distributors.addDistributorInfo: To add a new client, have them sign up through the platform. They will appear here once registered.
distributors.addDistributorTooltip: New clients sign up through the platform
distributors.infoBanner: New clients sign up through the platform and will appear here automatically.
distributors.commissionInfoBody: For each client you can set a personal commission rate (0–50%). This acts as a permanent discount in their catalog views – for example, a 15% commission means they always see prices 15% lower than your base wholesale price, and this price is used for their quotes and orders.
distributors.emptyDescription: Invite them to sign up via the platform! Clients will appear here automatically once they complete signup.
distributors.inviteToastDescription: Share your platform URL with potential clients to let them sign up.
distributors.deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

distributors.inviteResentDesc: A new invitation email has been sent to {{email}}.
